prompt: Swap their faces so Batman looks like a frustrated CI/CD pipeline and Robin is a smiling ‘All tests passed’ badge.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the facial regions of both characters. Replace Batman's face, located on the right side of the image, with a visual representation of a frustrated CI/CD pipeline, including error messages, red indicators, and a 'failed' status. Replace Robin's head, located on the left side of the image (viewed from the back), with a smiling 'All tests passed' badge, featuring a green background, a prominent checkmark, and a cheerful expression.
objects: Robin's body (on the left, viewed from the back)
Frustrated CI/CD pipeline (replacing Batman's face), including error messages, red indicators, and 'failed' status
Smiling 'All tests passed' badge (replacing Robin's head), with a green background, prominent checkmark, and cheerful expression
Speech bubble with "WE WISH YOU A MERRY CHRIS-"
